wines.name: Casa do Lima Vinho Verde 2024
wines.tasting_notes: Green apple, lime, white flowers; low alcohol (10.5%) and very refreshing
wines.food_pairing: Grilled seafood, sushi, seafood nasi goreng, hot Bali afternoons

wines.name: Quinta do Vale Escuro Douro Tinto 2021
wines.tasting_notes: Dark berries, plum, black pepper and a touch of oak (13.5%)
wines.food_pairing: Babi guling, grilled meats, hard cheeses, hearty pasta

wines.name: Serrano 10 Year Tawny Port
wines.tasting_notes: Caramel, roasted nuts, dried figs, long warm finish (20%)
wines.food_pairing: Desserts, dark chocolate, blue cheese, sunset conversations
